query:
Research the company "bostonbeer".

Research the company's recent financial performance including: (1) Latest quarterly earnings and any P&L misses or guidance reductions, (2) Recent CEO changes or new leadership appointments, (3) Current scale/revenue (Fortune 500 status, $10B+ threshold, midmarket status), (4) Industry vertical and primary business model, (5) Product portfolio and any recent platform launches, (6) Geographic or operational footprint showing multi-function complexity (manufacturing, distribution, media spend), (7) Recent strategic reviews, reorganizations, or operational transformation initiatives, (8) Margin trends and profitability metrics, (9) Production or capacity-related announcements

Focus on the last 6 months. Return a comprehensive summary with specific facts, numbers, and dates.
answer:
## Executive Summary

The Boston Beer Company (NYSE: SAM) is a midmarket beverage company operating in the high-end malt beverage industry, generating approximately $1.96 billion in annual revenue. Over the last six months, the company has navigated significant turbulence, marked by founder Jim Koch reassuming the CEO role, a massive Q1 2026 GAAP earnings loss driven by a $216 million litigation expense, and persistent volume declines across core brands. To stabilize performance, Boston Beer is aggressively shifting production in-house (targeting >90% internal brewing for 2026), modernizing its supply chain, and launching higher-ABV and "Beyond Beer" products to capture shifting consumer preferences.

## Detailed Analysis

### 1. Financial Performance & Margin Trends
Boston Beer has faced consecutive quarters of volume declines and earnings misses, severely impacted by legal expenses and rising input costs.

*   **Q1 2026 Earnings & Misses:** In Q1 2026, Boston Beer reported revenue of $433.93 million, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $436.8 million by 0.66% [Boston Beer (SAM) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Miss Estimates](https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/boston-beer-sam-q1-earnings-213005089.html). Non-GAAP EPS was $1.64, missing analyst estimates that ranged from $1.85 to $1.99 [BOSTON BEER ($SAM) Releases Q1 2026 Earnings](https://www.quiverquant.com/news/BOSTON+BEER+%28%24SAM%29+Releases+Q1+2026+Earnings). 
*   **Massive Litigation Loss:** The company recorded a staggering Q1 2026 GAAP net loss of $145.3 million, or $13.88 per diluted share. This was primarily driven by a $216 million pretax litigation expense ($15.52 per share) stemming from a supplier dispute [Boston Beer Company Q1 EPS Loss Challenges Bullish Profitability Narratives - Simply Wall St News](https://simplywall.st/stocks/us/food-beverage-tobacco/nyse-sam/boston-beer/news/boston-beer-company-q1-eps-loss-challenges-bullish-profitabi).
*   **Q4 2025 Performance:** This followed a weak Q4 2025, where net revenue fell 4.1% year-over-year to $385.7 million, resulting in a GAAP net loss of $22.5 million ($2.12 per share) [Boston Beer 2025 EPS jumps 95%, sets 2026 outlook | SAM Stock News](https://www.stocktitan.net/news/SAM/boston-beer-reports-fourth-quarter-financial-bfpglip33972.html).
*   **Volume Declines:** Depletions decreased 6% in Q4 2025 and 4% in Q1 2026. Shipments similarly fell 7.5% in Q4 2025 and 6.9% in Q1 2026, driven by lower volumes across Twisted Tea, Truly, Samuel Adams, and Hard Mountain Dew [Boston Beer 2025 EPS jumps 95%, sets 2026 outlook | SAM Stock News](https://www.stocktitan.net/news/SAM/boston-beer-reports-fourth-quarter-financial-bfpglip33972.html) [Boston Beer (SAM) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript - The Globe and Mail](https://www.theglobeandmail.com/investing/markets/stocks/SAM/pressreleases/1650943/boston-beer-sam-q1-2026-earnings-transcript/).
*   **Guidance Reductions:** Management narrowed full-year 2026 non-GAAP EPS guidance downward to $8.50–$10.50 (from $8.50–$11.00) due to rising energy and aluminum costs [The Boston Beer Company, Inc. Q1 2026 Earnings Call Summary](https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/boston-beer-company-inc-q1-123000407.html). Full-year 2026 GAAP EPS guidance was drastically reset to a loss of ($7.02) to ($5.02) to account for the litigation hit [Massive legal hit drives Boston Beer (NYSE: SAM) to Q1 loss](https://www.stocktitan.net/sec-filings/SAM/8-k-boston-beer-co-inc-reports-material-event-b702cdee97a9.html).
*   **Margin Dynamics:** Despite top-line struggles, Q1 2026 gross margin improved by 100 basis points year-over-year to 49.3%, driven by procurement savings and brewery efficiencies [Boston Beer Reports First Quarter Financial Results | The Boston Beer Company - IR Site](https://investors.bostonbeer.com/news-releases/news-release-details/boston-beer-reports-first-quarter-financial-results-3). However, 2026 margins face headwinds from expected tariff costs of $20 million to $30 million (up from $11 million in 2025) [Boston Beer (SAM) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript | The Motley Fool](https://www.fool.com/earnings/call-transcripts/2026/05/01/boston-beer-sam-q1-2026-earnings-transcript/) and third-party production shortfall fees expected to drag gross margins by 40 to 60 basis points [Boston Beer Reports Fourth Quarter Financial Results | The Boston Beer Company - IR Site](https://investors.bostonbeer.com/news-releases/news-release-details/boston-beer-reports-fourth-quarter-financial-results-2).

### 2. Scale, Industry Vertical & Business Model
Boston Beer operates firmly as a midmarket enterprise, falling well below the $10B+ revenue threshold required for Fortune 500 inclusion.

*   **Revenue Scale:** The company reported $1.96 billion in annual revenue for fiscal 2025 (a 2.38% YoY decrease) [The Boston Beer Company (SAM) Revenue 2005-2025](https://stockanalysis.com/stocks/sam/revenue/). As of May 2026, trailing twelve-month revenue sits at approximately $1.94 billion [Boston Beer Company (SAM) - Revenue](https://companiesmarketcap.com/boston-beer-company/revenue/), with a market capitalization of ~$2.35 billion as of March 2026 [The Boston Beer Company 2026 Profile: Stock Performance & Earnings | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/41112-91).
*   **Industry & Model:** Operating in the high-end malt beverage industry, Boston Beer utilizes a traditional three-tier distribution model. It employs a sales force of over 475 personnel to manage relationships with a network of approximately 400 independent wholesale distributors [How Does Boston Beer Company Work?](https://matrixbcg.com/blogs/how-it-works/bostonbeer) [What is Customer Demographics and Target Market of Boston Beer Company?](https://matrixbcg.com/blogs/target-market/bostonbeer).
*   **Distribution Shifts:** Distributor inventory averaged 4.5 weeks on hand as of March 2026, down from 5 weeks in Q1 2025 [Boston Beer Reports First Quarter Financial Results | The Boston Beer Company - IR Site](https://investors.bostonbeer.com/news-releases/news-release-details/boston-beer-reports-first-quarter-financial-results-3). Notably, the company is transitioning Hard MTN Dew distribution away from PepsiCo's Blue Cloud network to its own beer distributors to accelerate national growth [Hard MTN Dew Moves to Beer Network, Going to All 50 Markets as Blue Cloud Changes Course](https://www.brewbound.com/news/hard-mtn-dew-moves-to-beer-network-going-to-all-50-markets-as-blue-cloud-changes-course/).

### 3. Leadership Changes & Strategic Transformation
The company has restructured its executive team and operations to regain control over its supply chain and profitability.

*   **Executive Appointments:** Founder and Chairman Jim Koch reassumed the role of CEO on August 15, 2025, succeeding Michael Spillane, who transitioned to an advisory role through March 2026 [Boston Beer Company Announces CEO Transition | Boston Beer Company](https://www.bostonbeer.com/news/2025/08/boston-beer-company-announces-ceo-transition) [Boston Beer CEO Michael Spillane to Depart This Month; Jim Koch Takes Over As CEO & President | Brewbound](https://www.brewbound.com/news/boston-beer-ceo-michael-spillane-to-depart-this-month-jim-koch-takes-over-as-ceo-president/). In October 2025, Phil Hodges was promoted to Chief Operating Officer, and Phil Savastano was named Chief Supply Chain Officer [Boston Beer Company Names Phil Hodges Chief Operating Officer | Boston Beer Co.](https://www.bostonbeer.com/news/2025/10/boston-beer-company-names-phil-hodges-chief-operating-officer) [Boston Beer Company Names Phil Hodges Chief Operating Officer](https://finance.yahoo.com/news/boston-beer-company-names-phil-201500689.html).
*   **Production Insourcing:** To reduce co-manufacturing expenses, Boston Beer is aggressively modernizing its supply chain. After brewing ~86% of its domestic volume internally in 2025, the company is targeting over 90% in-house production for 2026 [Boston Beer details Beyond beer focus and key risks | SAM SEC Filing - Form 10-K](https://www.stocktitan.net/sec-filings/SAM/10-k-boston-beer-co-inc-files-annual-report-34d48f9af251.html) [Supply Chain Modernization At Boston Beer Company](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/supply-chain-modernization-boston-beer-company-terry-grossenbacher).
*   **Operational Initiatives:** The company is executing multi-year productivity initiatives targeting procurement, waste, and network optimization [Earnings call: Boston Beer Company narrows 2024 guidance amid industry shifts By Investing.com](https://www.investing.com/news/stock-market-news/earnings-call-boston-beer-company-narrows-2024-guidance-amid-industry-shifts-93CH-3684318). In 2026, management established a new "revenue management" productivity bucket, expected to yield meaningful margin contributions by 2027 [The Boston Beer Company, Inc. Q1 2026 Earnings Call Summary](https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/boston-beer-company-inc-q1-123000407.html).

### 4. Product Portfolio & Recent Launches
Boston Beer's core portfolio includes Samuel Adams, Twisted Tea, Truly Hard Seltzer, Angry Orchard, Dogfish Head, and Sun Cruiser [Boston Beer Reports Third Quarter Financial Results | The Boston Beer Company - IR Site](https://investors.bostonbeer.com/news-releases/news-release-details/boston-beer-reports-third-quarter-financial-results-2). Recent launches highlight a strategic pivot toward higher-ABV products, ready-to-drink (RTD) cocktails, and "Beyond Beer" innovations:

*   **High-ABV & RTD Innovations:** In May 2026, the company launched LYTT Electric Coolers, a 15% ABV malt-based RTD line packaged in glow-in-the-dark lightbulb-shaped containers [Boston Beer to Launch 15% ABV Lytt Electric Coolers | Brewbound](https://www.brewbound.com/news/boston-beer-to-launch-15-abv-lytt-electric-coolers/). In January 2026, Twisted Tea rolled out an 8% ABV "Extreme" Variety Pack nationwide [Twisted Tea Hard Iced Tea Expands 8% ABV Extreme Lineup, Rolls Out New Extreme Variety Pack Nationwide](https://www.stocktitan.net/news/SAM/twisted-tea-hard-iced-tea-expands-8-abv-extreme-lineup-rolls-out-new-4x4udcnl7bwu.html).
*   **Core Brand Refresh:** Twisted Tea launched a "Summer Party Pack" in May 2026 featuring a new Twisted Lemonade with a temperature-activated color-changing can [Twisted Tea Hard Iced Tea Lets Summer Rip with Americana-Inspired Party Pack Featuring New Twisted Lemonade and Return of Fan-Favorite Rocket Pop | Boston Beer Co.](https://www.bostonbeer.com/news/2026/05/twisted-tea-lets-summer-rip-with-americana-inspired-party-pack-featuring-new-lemonade-and-rocket-pop). Samuel Adams released "Cherry Bomb" (a 9.0% ABV Imperial Wheat Ale) in January 2026 and an "Our City. Our Beer." collaboration pack with Boston sports legends in March 2026 [SAM - Boston Beer Latest Stock News & Market Updates](https://www.stocktitan.net/news/SAM/) [Samuel Adams Unveils “Our City. Our Beer.” Variety Pack Crafted Alongside Derrick White, Garrett Crochet, Julian Edelman and Zdeno Chara | Boston Beer Co.](https://www.stocktitan.net/news/SAM/samuel-adams-unveils-our-city-our-beer-variety-pack-crafted-pnnfbz398y0p.html).
*   **Strategic Partnerships:** In March 2026, Sun Cruiser secured a multi-year deal as the Official RTD Cocktail of the U.S. Open and U.S. Women’s Open [Sun Cruiser to Become Official Ready-to-Drink Cocktail of the U.S. Open and U.S. Women’s Open Presented by Ally](https://www.bostonbeer.com/news/2026/03/sun-cruiser-to-become-official-ready-to-drink-cocktail-of-the-us-open-and--us-womens-open). The company also partnered with Brand Central to expand its core brands into new lifestyle and food licensing categories [Boston Beer Partners with Brand Central to Expand Licensing - Boston Today](https://nationaltoday.com/us/ma/boston/news/2026/03/09/boston-beer-partners-with-brand-central-to-expand-licensing/).

## Gaps and Limitations
Based on the provided research findings, the following requested information could not be verified:
*   **Media Spend:** No specific figures or strategies regarding the company's advertising or media spend were available.
*   **Geographic Footprint:** While the company noted shifting 90% of production in-house, the specific geographic locations of its manufacturing facilities and breweries were not detailed.
*   **Fortune 500 Status:** The findings confirm the company's revenue ($1.96B), which implicitly excludes it from the Fortune 500, but no explicit ranking or status confirmation was provided in the source text.
